0.response: {"Q0":"No, I don't think there was any strategy needed, since the game had pretty clear rules.  As far as choosing between gambles, sometimes there was an obvious best gamble and other times I did some very quick math to decide whether the risk was worth it.  There were a few that were about equal in my head, in which case I just used intuition."}
